title: Dracophilus rheolens

Dracophilus dregeanus is a succulent plant with potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Dracophilus dregeanus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other secondary metabolites that contribute to its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Dracophilus dregeanus are not well-documented, but the plant has been studied for its potential use in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa.

Further classification of Dracophilus rheolens includes its placement in the genus Dracophilus and the subfamily Ruschioideae.
